checkpoints.action: Output acceptance-criteria-<task_id>.json using Executable AC schema with ac_uid (sha256 of type+given+when+then+check, 16 chars)
Call Blast Radius Tool Phase 1 based on files_to_modify; produce blast-radius-map.json in dev-registry/<task_id>/ with confidence-tagged edges
Add acceptance_criteria_path field to ba.md Output JSON referencing docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-<task_id>.json
Quantify all subjective visual AC items (color token, px measurement) before using testability:manual-only (which produces pending_manual_evidence status)
